subject: english
text:
The poet, Ruskin Bond does not call his grandmother ‘childish’. What else was she, according to
him?  Why does he consider her to be so?
OR
Why does the poet call his grandmother a genius?
group_heading: Answer in Two or More Sentences

subject: english
text:
How do you say that grandma had been in the habit of climbing trees for a very long period?
Justify this by quoting the lines from the poem.
group_heading: Answer in Two or More Sentences

subject: english
text: What did the neighbours advise Ruskin Bond’s grandma? How did she respond to them?
group_heading: Answer in Two or More Sentences

subject: english
text:
Others feared that the granny would fall from a tree one day or the other. Did this happen? Or did
something else happen?
group_heading: Answer in Two or More Sentences

subject: english
text: What did the doctor recommend grandma? What was the reaction of the kids to this advice?
group_heading: Answer in Two or More Sentences

subject: english
text: ‘My dad knew his duties’. What did the speaker think his father’s duty was?
group_heading: Answer in Two or More Sentences

subject: english
text: Both the poet and his father were considerate towards Grandma. Substantiate the statement.
group_heading: Answer in Two or More Sentences

subject: english
text: How did grandma feel while she was resting in bed?
group_heading: Answer in Two or More Sentences

subject: english
text:
What qualities of grandma do you appreciate?
(April 2015)
group_heading: Answer in Two or More Sentences

subject: english
text: How did grandma fulfil her wish in the poem ‘Grandma Climbs a tree”? (April 2025 - 1)

subject: english
text:
“Ever since childhood, she’d had this gift for being happier in a tree than in a lift;”

A) Who does ‘she’ refer to?
B) What was the gift she had?
C) Where was she happier?

subject: english
text:
“Well, I’ll grow disgracefully, I can do it better.”

A) Who said this to whom?
B) What was disgraceful?
C) Why did the speaker say so?

subject: english
text:
“But it was feared by all that one day she’d have terrible fall. The outcome was different.”
A) Who does ‘all’ refer to ?
B) Why did they fear that she’d have a terrible fall?
C) What was the different outcome?

subject: english
text:
“I strongly recommend her, a quiet week in bed.”
A) Who is the 'I' referred to here?
B) Why was this recommendation given?
c)What was the response to the recommendation?

subject: english
text:
“For her, it was like a brief season in hell.”
A) What was ‘like a brief season in hell’?
B) Why was it like in hell for her ?
C) What would be like heaven to her?

subject: english
text:
Summarize in your own words the substance of the poem “Grandma Climbs a tree”.(April 2016, June
2023)
OR
Bring out the summary of the poem ‘Grandma Climbs a Tree’ , in your own words.
group_heading: Answer in Six or More Sentences

subject: english
text:
Ruskin Bond’s grandmother had an unusual habit of climbing trees. How was she successful in
fulfilling her desire to live in a tree house?
OR
Describe in your own words how the poet Ruskin Bond’s grandma was a genius and how she upheld
her right to reside in a tree? (April 2018)
OR
“The poet’s grandmother had a zeal for climbing trees.” Substantiate. (April 2024 Exam 2)
OR
According to the poet Ruskin Bond, his grandmother was ‘unique’. Write a paragraph to support this
statement. (April 2017)
OR
“My grandmother was a genius,” says the poet. Justify your answer. (June 2016, April 2022, March
2023)
OR
The poet appreciates his grandmother’s extraordinary behaviour very much. Justify (June 2017)
OR
The behaviour of Ruskin Bond’s grandmother is unusual. Explain. (June 2018)
OR
Ruskin Bond’s grandmother had an unusual habit of climbing trees. How was she successful in
fulfilling her desire to live in a tree house? (April 2019)
OR
Write in your own words how passionate the poet’s grandma was in climbing (June 2019)
OR
Why do you think that Ruskin Bond’s grandmother was a grown-up woman with childish habits and
desires? Substantiate. (June 2020)
group_heading: Answer in Six or More Sentences

subject: english
text:
Both the poet and his father were considerate towards grandmother. Substantiate this statement with
textual support. (April 2020, June 2022)
group_heading: Answer in Six or More Sentences

subject: english
text: A GREAT MARTYR EVER CHERISHED

subject: english
text:
The writer speaks of the ‘smile’ that welcomes anyone who enters Haneef’s house. What more do
we know about this ‘smile’?

subject: english
text: What did Haneef choose as his mission? Why did he do so?

subject: english
text: Life for Haneef in the beginning was never a smooth sail. Why was it so?

subject: english
text:
The absence of the mother, from home, taught the children something. What was that?      (April
2016) OR
How did Hema Aziz teach her children the message that “one’s duty is the most important thing in
life”? (2018 April)
OR
In what way did the absence of mother make Haneef and his brothers responsible ? (June 2018)
OR
What did Hanif and his brothers learn from the absence of their mother from home ? (Sept 2020)
OR
How did Haneef and his brothers learn to be independent at a young age ?( April 2022)
OR
What did Haneef’s mother’s absence from home teach her children ? (June 2022)

subject: english
text:
How does the writer describe the ‘introvert’ Haneef? (April 2019)
OR
How do you say that Hanif is an introvert ? (March 2023)
OR
How does the writer describe the ‘introvert’ Hanif? (May 2025 Exam 2)

subject: english
text:
Hanif was a young man with varied talents and interests. Illustrate this statement from textual
examples.
OR
How was Hanif able to keep himself cheerful throughout ? (April 2015)
OR

OR
As a soldier, ‘Hanif had various talents and interests in his youth’. Illustrate the statement. (June
2016)
OR
How was life for Hanif always ‘ekdam bindas’? (April 2017)
OR
Hanif was a young man with varied talents and interests. Support the statement. (June 2019)
OR
Haneef was a young man with varied talents and interests. Explain briefly. (April 2020)
OR
Hanifuddin was a young man with varied talents and interests. Illustrate the statement. (June 2023)
OR
How do you say that Haneef’s life was always ‘ekdam bindas’? (April 2024))
OR
Do you think that Haneef was very talented? Substantiate. (June 2024)

text: What were the dreams of Hanif? Do you think they were fulfilled?

text: Why did Haneef become very responsible at his tender age?

text: How did Haneef’s friends call him? What can we guess from his belongings?

text: How was the military training at IMA? How did it effect Haneef?

text:

text:
